title: Treatment of blastomycosis - Canada.ca
content:
## Treatment of blastomycosis
Learn how blastomycosis is diagnosed and treated.
- How is blastomycosis diagnosed?
- How is blastomycosis treated?

## How is blastomycosis diagnosed?
Blastomycosis is diagnosed based on symptoms and laboratory tests to check for the fungus that causes the disease .

## How is blastomycosis treated?
Blastomycosis is treated with antifungal drugs.
